接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/project/update

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/project/update

接口描述

修改项目信息

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectSeqId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"239","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"comId","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"3100","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"20211020094758b09bf","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"API%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE456","desc":"","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectParentId","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E7%BA%A7%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"202110200947588754d","desc":"","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectParentName","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E7%BA%A7%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"API%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE123","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"projectStatus","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectLevel","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7","exampleValue":"2","desc":"","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectTypeName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"API%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectTypeId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"PRJTYPE20220408112737","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"projectType","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"prjTypeId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"PRJTYPE20230602113257","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}}],"open":true},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"projectRoles","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"prjRoleSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1388","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"prjRoleNam","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"demoData","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"userGroup","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%84","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"prjTypeSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1388","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"typeSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"41856","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"type","required":false,"label":"%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"EMPLOYEE","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}}]}],"open":true},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"visibleType","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%EF%BC%88true%E4%B8%BA%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"true","desc":"","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"userGroup","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%84","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"type","required":false,"label":"%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"EMPLOYEE","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"staff","required":false,"label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empId","required":false,"label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5id","exampleValue":"U0000","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empNumber","required":false,"label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"A0001","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empNam","required":false,"label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%90%8D","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"phoneNbr","required":false,"label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E6%89%8B%E6%9C%BA%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"18111111111","desc":"","maxLength":"12"}}]}],"open":true},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"startDate","required":false,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2021-10-18","desc":"","maxLength":"12"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"endDate","required":false,"label":"%E7%BB%88%E6%AD%A2%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2021-11-18","desc":"","maxLength":"12"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customFieldValues","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFieldCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"MULTI_INPUT_094518693","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"customFieldValue","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"123456","desc":"","maxLength":"1500"}}],"open":true},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"overdue","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%BE%E6%9C%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"false","desc":"","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"projectStageDto","label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectStageCode","label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","maxLength":"50","exampleValue":"code"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectStageName","maxLength":"128","label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"applyUserConfig","label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E5%AF%B9%E8%B1%A1"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"applyUser","label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"%220%22","desc":"%20*%20%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%EF%BC%9A%E2%80%9C1%E2%80%9D%0D%0A*%20%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%EF%BC%9A%E2%80%9C0%E2%80%9D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"departIncludeChild","label":"%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E5%8C%85%E5%90%AB%E5%AD%90%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8","exampleValue":"false","desc":"%20*%20%E6%98%AF%EF%BC%9Atrue%0D%0A*%20%E5%90%A6%EF%BC%9Afalse"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"statisticsType","label":"%E6%9C%80%E7%BB%88%E5%8F%96%E4%BA%A4%E9%9B%86%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"UNION_SET","desc":"%20*%20%20%20%E5%B9%B6%E9%9B%86%EF%BC%9AUNION_SET%0D%0A*%20%20%E4%BA%A4%E9%9B%86%EF%BC%9AINTERSECTION"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"applyUserConfigDtoList","label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E8%8C
